Motion To Vacate Dismissal [C.C.P. 473(B)]
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF SENG KWI PHANG'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal [C.C.P. 473(B)] is Off calendar. Plaintiff did not serve and file the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing on the motion, including 10 days for service by mail outside California, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
